pandoc 
  to: html
  output-file: index.html
  standalone: true
  title-prefix: EST335 - Métodos Estatísticos para Machine Learning
  section-divs: true
  html-math-method: mathjax
  wrap: none
  default-image-extension: png
  toc: true
  variables: {}
  
metadata
  document-css: false
  link-citations: true
  date-format: long
  lang: en
  theme:
    light:
      - cosmo
      - theme.scss
    dark:
      - cosmo
      - theme-dark.scss
  mainfont: Atkinson Hyperlegible
  code-copy: true
  title: est335
